name: Never Fail Fudge
recipeIngredient: 1 cup chopped nuts - walnuts or pecans (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first five ingredients in a 4-quart saucepan.
2. Stir over low heat until blended.
3. Bring to boil over moderate heat, being careful not to mistake escaping air bubbles for boiling.
4. Continue boiling slowly, stirring constantly for 5 minutes (to soft ball stage).
5. Remove from heat and stir in chocolate, vanilla (and nuts if used) until chocolate is melted.
6. Pour into two buttered 9x9 inch pans and cool.
Yield: approximately 5 pounds.
